name: Almond Meringue- Master Chefs
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Powdered sugar, sifted, plus more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Cut out three 10-inch parchment paper circles and one 10-inch cardboard circle. Place the parchment circles on baking sheets.
3. Beat egg whites until they form soft peaks. Gradually add 2 1/2 tablespoons of sugar, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
4. Combine 2 1/2 cups powdered sugar and ground almonds; gently fold into the beaten egg whites.
5. Use a pastry bag fitted with your choice of tip to pipe designs onto the parchment paper-covered baking sheets. The mixture can also be used to form layers or other desired shapes.
6. Dust lightly with powdered sugar, if desired.
7. Bake until crisp and very lightly golden (for designs about half an inch thick, it takes 25 to 30 minutes).
8. Cool on racks after baking.
